wave_log.label: Audit Infrastructure
wave_log.notes: 5 audit scripts + utils.py + nic_enrichment.py. NIC source fields (Operator Name, CCN, unit types) resolve ambiguity in address-only audits. 841 address-match suspects reclassified: 50 confirmed phantoms, 588 co-located campuses, 508 pure IL.

wave_log.label: Phantom Fix â€” Row Integrity
wave_log.notes: 12 served phantoms triaged against Facility DB. 33 rows removed (5 served + 27 non-served + 1 duplicate). 3 ALF reclassified to SNF (CMS CCN confirmed). 7 ALF reclassified to ILF (new Source_Type). 4 SNF rows updated with migrated service flags. 4 shared-address patterns documented. Verified: 26,267 -> 26,234 rows.

wave_log.label: Southern Rename + Brookdale Dedup
wave_log.notes: 34 rows renamed: SOUTHERN ASSISTED LIVING, LLC -> BROOKDALE SENIOR LIVING (NIC-confirmed SALI acquisition Q1 2006). 23 unserved Brookdale duplicate rows removed (campus-level license records at same address as served wing-level rows, all NC ALF). Review workbook: audit_reports/Brookdale_Dedup_Review.xlsx. Finding: ALF census beds often lower than actual Facility DB consented counts â€” economic models may undercount ALF revenue (flagged for future build). Verified: 26,234 -> 26,211 rows, 0 served impact.

wave_log.label: Liberty Corporate Fix + Liberty Village
wave_log.notes: Liberty Health Management crosswalk built from LSL website (23 facilities) + LHR directory PDF (41 SNFs). 59 rows renamed to LIBERTY (from LIBERTY SENIOR LIVING, PROPCOs, blanks). 9 rows renamed to LIBERTY VILLAGE (separate IL company). 2 Source_Type corrections ALF->SNF (rows 8774, 9983). LIBERTY SENIOR LIVING fully cleaned out (0 remaining). 4 non-Liberty-Health rows left alone (Liberty Ridge, Liberty Retirement Properties of Lima, West Liberty Garden Apartments). Crosswalk artifacts: Liberty_Facility_Crosswalk.xlsx, Liberty_Crosswalk_DB_Match.xlsx, Liberty_QC_Review.xlsx. Verified: 26,211 rows, SNF 15,248 (+2), ALF 10,956 (-2), served 1,658 (unchanged).

wave_log.label: Three-tier Corporate Attribution (GLR -> CMS -> NIC) + Four-Rule
wave_log.notes: 4,182 Corporate_Name changes: 701 GLR, 1216 CMS, 2265 NIC. 1 row(s) removed (Liberty PROPCO dupe). 2,676 Ownership_Type reclassifications. 1605 NIC rows flagged (Tier C/suspicious). New column: Corp_Attribution_Source.
